name: Olive Garden Chicken Marsala
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken half-breasts, pounded to 1/4-inch thickness -- skinned and deboned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, pepper, and oregano in a shallow dish and blend well.
2. Heat the oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat until bubbling lightly.
3. Dredge each chicken half-bread in the seasoned flour mixture, shaking off excess.
4. Cook the chicken on medium heat for about 2 minutes on the first side, until lightly browned.
5. As you turn the chicken to the second side to cook, add the sliced mushrooms around the chicken pieces.
6. Cook the chicken for an additional 2 minutes on the second side, until lightly browned.
7. Stir the mushrooms and add the wine around the chicken pieces.
8. Cover the pan and simmer over medium-low heat for about 10 minutes.
Source: The Olive Garden.
